text: Can we do a take without a script?
Crossbee is automating human-to-human negotiation.
Humans are defined by our capacity for connection.
But reaching agreement is hard.
It takes time, skill, trust, and understanding.
But once in a while, we close the deal.
And when we do, when we find ways to work together,
we can achieve greatness.
Crossbee is advancing the frontier between the science and the art of negotiation.
Contracts are a complicated form of agreement.
So nuanced that even with AI, it still needs a lawyer's touch.
This is why we started our own law firm.
It took us 173 days to review our first 1,000 contracts.
But now, we do this every three weeks.
Over the last 50 years, every aspect of business has sped up,
except for contract redlining.
We're challenging that.
Today, we help history's fastest growing companies execute even faster.
Using Crossbee is simple.
You send us a contract over Slack or email.
Our paralegal agent routes it to our team of human lawyers and specially trained AI agents.
We incorporate our benchmarks and your preferences,
which we keep learning over time,
making every contract better than the last.
Within hours, you get your documents back,
and you only pay by the contract.
We're using our Series A to expand the incredibly talented teams
and to experiment with new AI strategies to help make agreement even faster.
If contracts are slowing you down, or if you believe in this mission, please reach out.
